---
title: "Demo for 'mcstprules::analysis_tools'"
---

This demo runs the code from `demo("analysis_tools", package = "mcstprules")` in R. 

```{r demo_execution, code = readLines(system.file("demo", "analysis_tools.R", package = "mcstprules")), fig.alt = "Core allocation check plot, 2D geometric visualization of the core region, and line charts showing arc cost sensitivity analysis."}
```

---

You can also [download the raw R script here](https://github.com/luciasouto13/mcstprules/blob/master/demo/analysis_tools.R) to run it locally on your computer.
